<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>IndexFlow — The Revenue Chain Belongs To You</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;600;700;800&family=DM+Sans:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;1,300&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --black: #0D1B2A;
    --white: #FFFFFF;
    --cream: #F4F7FA;
    --accent: #29ABE2;
    --accent2: #E8272A;
    --accent3: #F5C800;
    --mid: #F0F6FB;
    --border: rgba(41,171,226,0.15);
    --text-dim: #6B7E8F;
    --text-main: #0D1B2A;
  }

  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  .logo-img { display: flex; align-items: center; text-decoration: none; }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    background: var(--white);
    color: var(--text-main);
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 17px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  /* NOISE TEXTURE OVERLAY */
  body::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noise'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noise)' opacity='0.04'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 100;
    opacity: 0.4;
  }

  /* NAV */
  nav {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    z-index: 50;
    padding: 20px 48px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.95);
    backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(41,171,226,0.2);
  }

  .logo {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 22px;
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
    color: var(--text-main);
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .logo span { color: var(--accent2); }

  .nav-links {
    display: flex;
    gap: 32px;
    align-items: center;
    list-style: none;
  }

  .nav-links a {
    color: var(--text-dim);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 500;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }

  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--text-main); }

  .nav-cta {
    background: var(--accent);
    color: var(--white) !important;
    padding: 10px 22px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-weight: 600 !important;
    font-size: 14px !important;
    transition: opacity 0.2s !important;
  }

  .nav-cta:hover { opacity: 0.85; }

  /* HERO */
  .hero {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 120px 48px 80px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .hero-glow {
    position: absolute;
    width: 800px;
    height: 800px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(41,171,226,0.12) 0%, transparent 70%);
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .hero-glow2 {
    position: absolute;
    width: 600px;
    height: 600px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(245,200,0,0.08) 0%, transparent 70%);
    top: 20%;
    right: -10%;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .hero-badge {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    background: rgba(41,171,226,0.1);
    border: 1px solid rgba(41,171,226,0.3);
    color: var(--accent);
    padding: 6px 16px;
    border-radius: 100px;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    margin-bottom: 36px;
    animation: fadeUp 0.6s ease both;
  }

  .hero-badge::before {
    content: '';
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
    background: var(--accent2);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: pulse 2s infinite;
  }

  @keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
    50% { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(0.8); }
  }

  h1 {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: clamp(48px, 7vw, 88px);
    line-height: 1.0;
    letter-spacing: -3px;
    max-width: 900px;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
    animation: fadeUp 0.7s 0.1s ease both;
  }

  h1 .line-accent { color: var(--accent); }
  h1 .line-dim { color: #B0BEC9; }

  .hero-sub {
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 300;
    color: #4A6070;
    max-width: 580px;
    margin: 0 auto 48px;
    line-height: 1.7;
    animation: fadeUp 0.7s 0.2s ease both;
  }

  .hero-sub strong {
    color: var(--text-main);
    font-weight: 600;
  }

  .hero-actions {
    display: flex;
    gap: 16px;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    animation: fadeUp 0.7s 0.3s ease both;
  }

  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--accent);
    color: var(--white);
    padding: 16px 36px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 16px;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .btn-primary:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(41,171,226,0.35);
  }

  .btn-secondary {
    color: var(--text-main);
    padding: 16px 36px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-weight: 500;
    font-size: 16px;
    text-decoration: none;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }

  .btn-secondary:hover {
    border-color: rgba(41,171,226,0.4);
    background: rgba(41,171,226,0.05);
  }

  .hero-note {
    margin-top: 20px;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #6B7E8F;
    animation: fadeUp 0.7s 0.4s ease both;
  }

  /* MARQUEE */
  .marquee-section {
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 18px 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--mid);
  }

  .marquee-track {
    display: flex;
    gap: 64px;
    animation: marquee 25s linear infinite;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  .marquee-item {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: #4A6070;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .marquee-item::before {
    content: '✦';
    color: var(--accent);
    font-size: 10px;
  }

  @keyframes marquee {
    from { transform: translateX(0); }
    to { transform: translateX(-50%); }
  }

  /* SECTIONS */
  section {
    padding: 120px 48px;
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  .section-label {
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--accent2);
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  h2 {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: clamp(36px, 4vw, 56px);
    letter-spacing: -2px;
    line-height: 1.05;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }

  h2 em {
    font-style: italic;
    color: #B0BEC9;
  }

  /* PROBLEM SECTION */
  .problem-section {
    padding: 120px 0;
    max-width: 100%;
    background: #F0F6FB;
  }

  .problem-inner {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 48px;
  }

  .problem-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 2px;
    margin-top: 60px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 12px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .problem-card {
    padding: 48px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
    position: relative;
  }

  .problem-card:nth-child(2) {
    border-left: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  .problem-card:nth-child(3),
  .problem-card:nth-child(4) {
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  .problem-card:nth-child(4) {
    border-left: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  .problem-icon {
    font-size: 28px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    display: block;
  }

  .problem-card h3 {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 20px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
  }

  .problem-card p {
    color: #4A6070;
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.7;
  }

  /* SOLUTION */
  .solution-statement {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: clamp(28px, 3.5vw, 44px);
    line-height: 1.2;
    letter-spacing: -1.5px;
    border-left: 4px solid var(--accent2);
    padding-left: 32px;
    margin: 60px 0;
    color: var(--text-main);
  }

  .solution-statement span {
    color: var(--accent);
  }

  /* FEATURES GRID */
  .features-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 1px;
    background: rgba(41,171,226,0.15);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 12px;
    overflow: hidden;
    margin-top: 60px;
  }

  .feature-card {
    background: var(--white);
    padding: 40px 36px;
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }

  .feature-card:hover {
    background: #EBF5FB;
  }

  .feature-num {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    color: var(--accent2);
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .feature-card h3 {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 18px;
    letter-spacing: -0.3px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }

  .feature-card p {
    color: #4A6070;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 1.7;
  }

  /* PRICING */
  .pricing-section {
    padding: 120px 0;
    background: #F0F6FB;
    max-width: 100%;
  }

  .pricing-inner {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 48px;
  }

  .pricing-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 16px;
    margin-top: 60px;
  }

  .pricing-card {
    background: var(--white);
    border: 1px solid rgba(41,171,226,0.2);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 36px 28px;
    position: relative;
    transition: transform 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 16px rgba(41,171,226,0.06);
  }

  .pricing-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-4px);
    border-color: rgba(41,171,226,0.4);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(41,171,226,0.12);
  }

  .pricing-card.featured {
    border-color: var(--accent);
    background: rgba(41,171,226,0.04);
  }

  .pricing-card.featured::before {
    content: 'MOST POPULAR';
    position: absolute;
    top: -12px;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    background: var(--accent);
    color: var(--white);
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 4px 14px;
    border-radius: 100px;
  }

  .pricing-tier {
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--text-dim);
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .pricing-card.featured .pricing-tier {
    color: var(--accent);
  }

  .pricing-price {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 48px;
    letter-spacing: -2px;
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }

  .pricing-price sup {
    font-size: 22px;
    letter-spacing: 0;
    vertical-align: top;
    margin-top: 8px;
    display: inline-block;
  }

  .pricing-period {
    color: var(--text-dim);
    font-size: 13px;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
  }

  .pricing-tagline {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-style: italic;
    color: #4A6070;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
    padding-bottom: 28px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    line-height: 1.5;
  }

  .pricing-features {
    list-style: none;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }

  .pricing-features li {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #4A6070;
    padding: 8px 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 10px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(41,171,226,0.08);
  }

  .pricing-features li:last-child {
    border-bottom: none;
  }

  .pricing-features li::before {
    content: '→';
    color: var(--accent);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-top: 2px;
  }

  .pricing-features li strong {
    color: var(--text-main);
    font-weight: 600;
  }

  .pricing-btn {
    display: block;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 14px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 14px;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    color: var(--white);
  }

  .pricing-btn:hover {
    border-color: rgba(41,171,226,0.4);
    background: rgba(41,171,226,0.05);
  }

  .pricing-card.featured .pricing-btn {
    background: var(--accent);
    color: var(--white);
    border-color: var(--accent);
  }

  .pricing-card.featured .pricing-btn:hover {
    box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(41,171,226,0.35);
  }

  .enterprise-note {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 40px;
    color: var(--text-dim);
    font-size: 14px;
  }

  .enterprise-note a {
    color: var(--text-main);
    text-decoration: underline;
    text-underline-offset: 3px;
  }

  /* GHL SECTION */
  .ghl-section {
    padding: 120px 48px;
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  .ghl-compare {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 2px;
    margin-top: 60px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .ghl-col {
    padding: 48px;
  }

  .ghl-col.them {
    background: rgba(232,39,42,0.04);
    border: 1px solid rgba(232,39,42,0.15);
    border-radius: 12px 0 0 12px;
  }

  .ghl-col.us {
    background: rgba(41,171,226,0.05);
    border: 1px solid rgba(41,171,226,0.2);
    border-radius: 0 12px 12px 0;
    border-left: none;
  }

  .ghl-col-label {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
  }

  .ghl-col.them .ghl-col-label { color: var(--accent2); }
  .ghl-col.us .ghl-col-label { color: var(--accent); }

  .ghl-col h3 {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 24px;
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
  }

  .compare-list {
    list-style: none;
  }

  .compare-list li {
    padding: 14px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(41,171,226,0.1);
    font-size: 15px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 12px;
    color: #4A6070;
  }

  .compare-list li:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

  .compare-list li .icon {
    flex-shrink: 0;
    font-size: 14px;
    margin-top: 2px;
  }

  /* OUTREACH SECTION */
  .outreach-section {
    padding: 120px 0;
    background: #F0F6FB;
    max-width: 100%;
  }

  .outreach-inner {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 48px;
  }

  .email-mockup {
    background: var(--white);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 40px;
    margin-top: 60px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .email-mockup::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 3px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent2), transparent);
  }

  .email-header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
    padding-bottom: 24px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  .email-dot {
    width: 12px;
    height: 12px;
    border-radius: 50%;
  }

  .email-from {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #6B7E8F;
  }

  .email-from strong { color: var(--text-main); }

  .email-subject {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: -0.3px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }

  .email-body {
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    color: #4A6070;
  }

  .email-body p { margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .email-body strong { color: var(--white); }

  .email-highlight {
    background: rgba(41,171,226,0.08);
    border-left: 3px solid var(--accent);
    padding: 16px 20px;
    border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
    margin: 24px 0;
    font-size: 15px;
    color: var(--white);
  }

  /* SOCIAL PROOF */
  .proof-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 16px;
    margin-top: 60px;
  }

  .proof-card {
    background: var(--white);
    border: 1px solid rgba(41,171,226,0.15);
    box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(41,171,226,0.06);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 32px;
  }

  .proof-quote {
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 1.7;
    color: var(--text-main);
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    font-style: italic;
  }

  .proof-quote::before { content: '"'; color: var(--accent); }
  .proof-quote::after { content: '"'; color: var(--accent); }

  .proof-author {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #6B7E8F;
  }

  .proof-author strong { color: var(--text-main); display: block; }

  /* CTA SECTION */
  .cta-section {
    padding: 160px 48px;
    text-align: center;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .cta-section::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    width: 600px;
    height: 600px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(41,171,226,0.1) 0%, transparent 70%);
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  }

  .cta-section h2 {
    max-width: 700px;
    margin: 0 auto 24px;
  }

  .cta-section p {
    color: var(--text-dim);
    font-size: 18px;
    max-width: 480px;
    margin: 0 auto 48px;
  }

  /* FOOTER */
  footer {
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(41,171,226,0.15);
    padding: 40px 48px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    color: #6B7E8F;
    font-size: 13px;
  }

  /* ANIMATIONS */
  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  .fade-in {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
    transition: opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease;
  }

  .fade-in.animate {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(24px);
  }

  .fade-in.animate.visible {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }

  /* DIVIDER LINE */
  .divider {
    height: 1px;
    background: rgba(41,171,226,0.15);
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    nav { padding: 16px 24px; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    section, .hero, .ghl-section, .cta-section { padding: 80px 24px; }
    h1 { letter-spacing: -2px; }
    .problem-grid, .ghl-compare, .proof-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .features-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .pricing-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .ghl-col.them { border-radius: 12px 12px 0 0; }
    .ghl-col.us { border-radius: 0 0 12px 12px; border-left: 1px solid rgba(0,229,160,0.2); border-top: none; }
    footer { flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; text-align: center; }
    .pricing-inner, .problem-inner, .outreach-inner { padding: 0 24px; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <a href="#" class="logo-img"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="IndexFlow" style="height:36px; width:auto;"></a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#features">Features</a></li>
    <li><a href="#pricing">Pricing</a></li>
    <li><a href="#compare">Why IndexFlow</a></li>
    <li><a href="#pricing" class="nav-cta">Start Free Trial →</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero" style="max-width:100%; padding-top:140px;">
  <div class="hero-glow"></div>

<!-- PROBLEM -->
<div class="problem-section">
  <div class="problem-inner">
    <p class="section-label fade-in">The Problem</p>
    <h2 class="fade-in">You're paying to build<br><em>someone else's empire.</em></h2>
    <div class="problem-grid fade-in">
      <div class="problem-card">
        <span class="problem-icon">💸</span>
        <h3>Tool stacking is bleeding you dry</h3>
        <p>Ahrefs. SurferSEO. Screaming Frog. IndexNow. Rank tracker. Content tool. You're paying $300–600/month across 6 tools that don't talk to each other and each one owns a piece of your workflow.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="problem-card">
        <span class="problem-icon">🔗</span>
        <h3>White label platforms take a cut</h3>
        <p>Most "white label" tools aren't really white label. They control the pricing, take a slice of every transaction, and can change terms the moment it suits them. You're renting someone else's business model.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="problem-card">
        <span class="problem-icon">🌀</span>
        <h3>All-in-one platforms do everything badly</h3>
        <p>They promise the world — CRM, funnels, SEO, email, everything. What they deliver is 60% of each tool. Their SEO doesn't index your content. Their reports don't impress clients. The learning curve never ends.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="problem-card">
        <span class="problem-icon">⛓️</span>
        <h3>You're dependent on their roadmap</h3>
        <p>When your primary platform raises prices, kills a feature, or pivots — your entire operation shifts. You've built your agency on rented land. One policy change and the ground moves under your feet.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- SOLUTION -->
<section id="features">
  <p class="section-label fade-in">The Solution</p>
  <div class="solution-statement fade-in">
    IndexFlow doesn't host your content.<br>
    It <span>delivers</span> it — indexed, ranked,<br>
    and branded as <span>yours</span>.
  </div>

  <p class="fade-in" style="color: var(--text-dim); max-width: 640px; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 20px;">
    Your content lives where you built it. IndexFlow connects to it, optimises it, and makes sure Google finds it — fast. No migration. No lock-in. Works with your existing site, GHL funnel, Wordpress, Webflow, anything.
  </p>

  <div class="features-grid fade-in">
    <div class="feature-card">
      <div class="feature-num">01</div>
      <h3>Google Indexing Automation</h3>
      <p>Stop waiting weeks for Google to find your pages. IndexFlow pushes new and updated content to Google's index automatically — hours, not weeks.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-card">
      <div class="feature-num">02</div>
      <h3>40+ Tools, One Login</h3>
      <p>Rank tracking, site audits, keyword research, backlink analysis, content scoring, schema tools, competitor analysis — all in one dashboard.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-card">
      <div class="feature-num">03</div>
      <h3>True White Label</h3>
      <p>Your logo. Your colours. Your domain. Your price. Clients never see IndexFlow. You set the margin, you keep the revenue. Every penny of it.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-card">
      <div class="feature-num">04</div>
      <h3>Client Workspaces</h3>
      <p>Each client gets their own isolated workspace — their own dashboard, their own reports, their own data. Clean, professional, and completely under your brand.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-card">
      <div class="feature-num">05</div>
      <h3>Automated Branded Reports</h3>
      <p>Set it once. Every client gets a branded PDF report on schedule showing their rankings, indexing status, and wins. You look like a machine. You barely lifted a finger.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-card">
      <div class="feature-num">06</div>
      <h3>Works With Everything</h3>
      <p>GoHighLevel. WordPress. Webflow. Shopify. Custom built. It doesn't matter where your content lives — IndexFlow's delivery layer connects to all of it.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-card">
      <div class="feature-num">07</div>
      <h3>Search Console Integration</h3>
      <p>Connect Google Search Console across all client domains. See indexing coverage, crawl errors, and performance data for every site in one place.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-card">
      <div class="feature-num">08</div>
      <h3>Technical SEO Suite</h3>
      <p>Full site crawls, broken link detection, page speed insights, Core Web Vitals monitoring, redirect chains, canonical issues — the whole technical stack.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-card">
      <div class="feature-num">09</div>
      <h3>No Migration Required</h3>
      <p>IndexFlow is a delivery and optimisation layer — not a website builder. Your clients don't move anything. You just connect and go.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<style>
  .tools-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 2px;
    background: rgba(41,171,226,0.15);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 12px;
    overflow: hidden;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }

  .tools-category {
    background: var(--white);
    padding: 36px 32px;
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }

  .tools-category:hover { background: #EBF5FB; }

  .tools-cat-label {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 14px;
    letter-spacing: -0.2px;
    color: var(--white);
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    padding-bottom: 16px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  .tools-list {
    list-style: none;
  }

  .tools-list li {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #4A6070;
    padding: 8px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(242,240,236,0.04);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    transition: color 0.15s;
  }

  .tools-list li:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

  .tools-list li::before {
    content: '';
    width: 4px;
    height: 4px;
    background: var(--accent);
    border-radius: 50%;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .tools-category:hover .tools-list li { color: var(--text-main); }

  .tools-total {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 20px;
    background: rgba(41,171,226,0.06);
    border: 1px solid rgba(41,171,226,0.2);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 24px 32px;
    margin-top: 4px;
  }

  .tools-total-num {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 56px;
    letter-spacing: -3px;
    color: var(--accent);
    line-height: 1;
  }

  .tools-total-text {
    font-size: 16px;
    color: #4A6070;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }

  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .tools-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
  }

  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .tools-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  }
</style>

<!-- GHL COMPARE -->
<section class="ghl-section" id="compare">
  <p class="section-label fade-in">The Honest Comparison</p>
  <h2 class="fade-in">Not a competitor.<br><em>A correction.</em></h2>
  <p class="fade-in" style="color:var(--text-dim); max-width:600px; margin-top:16px; font-size:17px; line-height:1.7;">
    IndexFlow doesn't build websites or run your CRM. It does one thing brilliantly — makes sure every page you've already built gets found, ranked, and delivered. It's the missing SEO layer for platforms that promised SEO but never delivered it.
  </p>

  <div class="ghl-compare fade-in">
    <div class="ghl-col them">
      <div class="ghl-col-label">The Old Way</div>
      <h3>All-in-one platforms</h3>
      <ul class="compare-list">
        <li><span class="icon">✗</span> $297–$497/month for features you use 40% of</li>
        <li><span class="icon">✗</span> SEO is an afterthought — pages don't get indexed</li>
        <li><span class="icon">✗</span> "White label" means their brand stays, not yours</li>
        <li><span class="icon">✗</span> They take a cut of your reseller revenue</li>
        <li><span class="icon">✗</span> Learning curve never ends</li>
        <li><span class="icon">✗</span> You're building on their terms, their roadmap</li>
        <li><span class="icon">✗</span> Raise prices? Your clients pay more. Your margin shrinks.</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="ghl-col us">
      <div class="ghl-col-label">IndexFlow</div>
      <h3>The SEO delivery layer</h3>
      <ul class="compare-list">
        <li><span class="icon" style="color:var(--accent)">✓</span> $99–$349/month. Only pay for what you use.</li>
        <li><span class="icon" style="color:var(--accent)">✓</span> Pages indexed in hours, not weeks</li>
        <li><span class="icon" style="color:var(--accent)">✓</span> True white label — your logo, your domain, your brand</li>
        <li><span class="icon" style="color:var(--accent)">✓</span> 100% of your client revenue stays with you</li>
        <li><span class="icon" style="color:var(--accent)">✓</span> Works with platforms you already use</li>
        <li><span class="icon" style="color:var(--accent)">✓</span> You own the client relationship entirely</li>
        <li><span class="icon" style="color:var(--accent)">✓</span> You set the price. You keep every penny.</li>
      </ul>

  </div>
</section>

<div class="outreach-section">
  <div class="outreach-inner">
    <p class="section-label fade-in">For Agency Owners</p>
    <h2 class="fade-in">The conversation your<br><em>clients are waiting for.</em></h2>
    <p class="fade-in" style="color:var(--text-dim); max-width:560px; margin-top:16px; font-size:17px; line-height:1.7;">
      IndexFlow Pro gives you a fully branded SEO platform to offer clients at whatever price you choose. Here's how that conversation starts.
    </p>

    <div class="email-mockup fade-in">
      <div class="email-header">
        <div class="email-dot" style="background:#ff5f57"></div>
        <div class="email-dot" style="background:#febc2e"></div>
        <div class="email-dot" style="background:#28c840"></div>
        <div class="email-from" style="margin-left:8px">
          <strong>Your Name</strong> · <a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="473e2832350726202229243e6924282a">[email&#160;protected]</a> → <a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="1a7976737f746e5a6e727f73686934797577">[email&#160;protected]</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="email-subject">
        Quick question about your SEO — are your pages actually being indexed?
      </div>

      <div class="email-body">
        <p>Hey [First Name],</p>
        <p>Saw your post in [subreddit] — sounds like you've been putting serious work into your content.</p>

        <div class="email-highlight">
          Quick question: have you checked whether Google is actually indexing those pages? Most content platforms — including GoHighLevel — have a well-documented indexing problem. New pages can sit unfound for weeks or months. Great content that nobody searches for is just a very expensive diary.
        </div>

        <p>I run a small SEO operation and one of the tools I use for clients flags this automatically. Happy to run a free indexing audit on your site — takes about 5 minutes and will tell you exactly which pages Google can and can't find.</p>

        <p>No pitch attached, genuinely just useful to know. Want me to take a look?</p>

        <p style="color:var(--white)">— [Your Name]</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <p class="fade-in" style="color:var(--text-dim); font-size:14px; margin-top:24px; text-align:center;">
      This one email converts because it leads with a real problem, delivers value first, and never mentions pricing. The tool sells itself once they see the audit results.
    </p>
  </div>
</div>
